name: Mass Suggestion

rulesText.description: A high-tier version of her social pressure: broad, elegant, and terrifying when used on bystanders, guards, or enemy mobs.

mechanics.label: Targets
mechanics.description: You can affect up to twelve creatures of your choice.

mechanics.label: Harm Ends
mechanics.description: Damaging a target ends the spell for that creature.

mechanics.label: Upcast
mechanics.description: Higher slots extend duration to 10 days, 30 days, or 1 year and a day.

desc: A high-tier version of her social pressure: broad, elegant, and terrifying when used on bystanders, guards, or enemy mobs.
